## Description {#description}

Contains a list of all available collations for alphabetical comparison of strings.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Name of the collation.
- `language` ([Nullable(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/nullable)) — The language.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
